Academic Calendar

2026 - Spring

All deadlines are at 12:00 midnight unless otherwise stated.
All dates and deadlines are subject to change.

January 1
Deadline for payment in full or enrollment payment plan. Class schedules subject to cancellation if full payment not made or not enrolled in payment plan.
January 12
New freshmen and transfer student orientation
January 14
Classes begin
January 19
Holiday
January 21
Last day to drop a course without a grade (5th class day) 11:59 p.m.
January 22
Last day to register or add a course (6th class day) 5:00 p.m.
January 28 to
March 27
Apply online via myState for May 2026 graduation - $50 Early Bird Fee. Graduate Students must be currently enrolled to apply for graduation.
February 12
Deadline for undergraduate students receiving incomplete grades in a previous semester to submit the coursework (30 calendar days)
February 25
First progress grades reporting deadline (30th class day)
March 4
Mid-point of semester
March 5
Last day to drop a class with a "W" grade (36th class day) 5:00 p.m. Note that tuition charges will still apply.
March 9 to
March 13
Spring Break – No Classes Scheduled (Dates Subject to Change)
March 23 to
April 2
Faculty advising for pre-registration (Some departments begin advising earlier)
March 27
Last day to apply for May 2026 degree via myState - $50 Early Bird Fee
March 27
Second progress grade reporting deadline (end of week 10)
March 28 to
April 30
Apply online via myState for May 2026 degree - $150 Regular Degree Application Fee
April 3
Holiday (Classes will not meet; University offices closed)
April 6
Holiday (Classes will not meet; University offices open)
April 7 to
April 17
Pre-registration period for summer and fall semesters
April 20
Last day to withdraw from University (ten days of classes remaining)
April 21
Progress grade reporting closes
April 30
Final deadline to apply for May 2026 graduation via myState - $150 Regular Degree Application Fee
May 4
Last regularly scheduled class day
May 5
Additional Day for Monday classes that meet once per week. Deadline for graduate students receiving incomplete grades in a previous semester to submit the coursework.
May 6
Reading and Reflection Day (No mandatory class assignments, requirements, meetings)
May 7 to
May 13
Final examinations (May 7, 8, 11, 12, 13)
May 12
Doctor of Veterinary Medicine (DVM) Commencement - 11:30am (Humphrey Coliseum). DVM Awards Reception (10-11am)
May 12
Doctoral Graduation and Hooding Ceremony (Ph.D. & Ed.D.) – 4:00 p.m. (Bettersworth Auditorium, Lee Hall)
May 13
MSU-Meridian Commencement - 11:00 a.m. (MSU Riley Center in Meridian, MS)
May 14
Starkville Campus Commencement – 9:30 a.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
College of Arts & Sciences
College of Integrative Studies
May 14
Starkville Campus Commencement – 2:30 p.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
ACCESS
College of Agriculture & Life Sciences
College of Education
May 15
Last day for May 2026 degree applicants to pay account balance
May 15
Starkville Campus Commencement – 9:30 a.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
College of Architecture, Art & Design
College of Business
May 15
Starkville Campus Commencement – 2:30 p.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
Academic Affairs
Bagley College of Engineering
College of Forest Resources
College of Professional & Continuing Studies
College of Veterinary Medicine
May 18
Final Grades Due 10:00 a.m.
May 18
Undergraduate academic forgiveness unavailable due to end of term process
May 19
Last day for undergraduate degree candidates to apply for academic forgiveness

2026 - Fall

All deadlines are at 11:59 p.m. unless otherwise stated.
All dates and deadlines are subject to change.
Please Note: Changes made to Last regularly scheduled class day, Reading day, and Final Exam dates 5/14/25

August 1
Deadline for payment in full or enrollment in payment plan. Class schedules subject to cancelation if full payment not made or not enrolled in payment plan.
August 17
New freshmen and transfer student orientation
August 19
Classes begin
August 25
Fall Convocation
August 25
Last day to drop a course without a grade (5th class day) 11:59 p.m.
August 26
Last day to register or add a course (6th class day) 5:00 p.m. Graduate students must be currently enrolled to apply for graduation.
September 2 to
October 23
Apply online via myState for December 2026 degree - $50 Early Bird Fee
September 7
Labor Day Holiday - no classes scheduled
September 17
Deadline for undergraduate students receiving incomplete grades in a previous semester to submit the coursework. (30 calendar days)
September 30
First progress grade reporting deadline (30th class day)
October 8 to
October 9
Fall Break – no classes scheduled (subject to change)
October 12
Last day to drop a course with a W grade (36th class day) 5:00 p.m. Please note that the tuition charges will still apply.
October 19 to
October 30
Faculty advising for pre-registration (Some departments begin advising earlier)
October 23
Last day to apply for December 2026 degree via myState - $50 Early Bird Fee
October 23
Second progress grade reporting deadline (end of week 10)
October 24 to
November 23
December 2026 degree application via myState - $150 Regular Degree Application Fee. Graduate students must be currently enrolled to apply for graduation.
November 2 to
November 13
Pre-registration period for spring semester
November 11
Last day to withdraw from semester (ten days of classes remaining)
November 12
Progress grade reporting closes
November 23
Deadline to apply for December 2026 degree via myState - $150 Regular Degree Application Fee
November 25 to
November 27
Thanksgiving holiday – no classes scheduled
November 30
Classes resume
December 1
Last regularly scheduled class day
December 2
Deadline for graduate students receiving incomplete grades in a previous semester to submit the coursework
December 2
Reading and Reflection Day (No mandatory class assignments, requirements, meetings)
December 3 to
December 10
Final examinations (December 3, 4, 7, 8, 9, 10)
December 5
Make-up day (if needed)
December 10
MSU-Meridian Commencement - 11:00 a.m. (MSU Riley Center in Meridian, MS)
December 10
Doctoral Graduation and Hooding Ceremony (Ph.D. & Ed.D.) – 4:00 p.m. (Bettersworth Auditorium, Lee Hall)
December 11
Starkville Campus Commencement – 9:30 a.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
Colleges TBD
December 11
Starkville Campus Commencement – 2:30 p.m. (Humphrey Coliseum)
Colleges TBD
December 11
Last day for December 2026 degree applicants to pay account balance 3:00 p.m.
December 14
Final Grades Due 10:00 a.m.
December 14
Undergraduate academic forgiveness unavailable due to end of term process
December 15
Last day for undergraduate degree candidates to apply for academic forgiveness
December 23 to
January 1
Winter Holidays
